2179180.name: Hex Party
2179180.description:
Hex Party is an online + local multiplayer party game where a tactical board game collides with chaos minigames. Roll, sabotage, use wild items, and survive “friendship tests” across themed worlds.

ONLINE AND LOCAL MULTIPLAYER

Play how you want. Hex Party lets 1 to 8 players compete online or locally on the same screen. Going solo? Add bots to practice or fill out the match. Whether you’re playing online or in person, it’s the same friendship-wrecking chaos.

BOARD GAME STRATEGY, PARTY GAME CHAOS

Outplay your friends on multi-themed boards with items, hazards, and risky decisions every turn. Your plan can be perfect… until the next minigame flips the table.

ITEMS YOU ACTUALLY BUILD PLAYS AROUND

Hex Party’s steampunk-magic world is full of usable items, treasure chests, and shop buys. Grab tools that fit your style and turn a bad position into a comeback.

MINIGAMES THAT ARE LONGER AND MORE "GAME-LIKE"

No 5-second microgames — Hex Party minigames are designed to feel like full little games: movement, timing, mind games, and clutch moments.

New minigames and boards are added over time as free updates.

THEMED WORLDS

Each round can throw you into a different themed world, letting every minigame have its own art style and rules without being locked to one look.
